2023-24 Rhode Island Rams Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 12-20 (6-12, 10th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Archie Miller

PS/G: 72.6 (208th of 362)

PA/G: 76.3 (301st of 362)

SRS: -2.26 (188th of 362)

SOS: 2.87 (104th of 362)

ORtg: 105.2 (205th of 362)

DRtg: 110.7 (333rd of 362)
